title: TRANSGENDER SERVICES - 211info
text: HILLMAN EAST PORTLAND TRANSGENDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides hormone replacement therapy. 14601 SE Division Street Portland, OR 97236 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as transgender Hours: Monday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday 10:30am-7pm, Wednesday noon-7pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 875-7820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, most private insurance plans, and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Deschutes, Marion, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - INFO FOR TEENS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLMAN EAST PORTLAND
